name: hyper-sills
description: HYPER-SILLs — the neurodivergent-first AI skill vault. 89 hero-named skills across agents, dev, broski, and youtube, wired with Graph-of-Skills dependency retrieval and an MCP server. Stop apologising for your brain. Start building.

plugins.name: hyper-sills-vault
plugins.description: Install the full HYPER-SILLs vault: an MCP server (search/load/recommend skills + Graph-of-Skills dependency graph) plus slash commands to find and load skills by problem, not ID.
plugins.author: welshDog
